name: ContextMenuFilteringPattern

Uses configuration-driven rules to show/hide commands
Based on node name, section type, and command type
Implemented through ContextMenuFilterService
Configuration file: config/menu_filter_rules.json
Enables dynamic UI customization without code deployment

Universal application: Any system that needs to handle ambiguous or incomplete resource identifiers

name: StatefulFaultTolerancePattern
observations: Abstracted from CircuitBreaker implementation in src/commander/utils/circuit_breaker.py
Core concept: Stateful mechanism to prevent cascading failures in service calls
Key properties: failureThreshold (default 3), recoveryTimeout (default 60s), stateTransitions (CLOSED->OPEN->HALF_OPEN->CLOSED)
Thread-safe implementation using Lock for concurrent access
Universal application: Any system making external service calls requiring fault isolation
Pattern integrity maintained through state management and configurable parameters
Enhanced pattern documentation with additional implementation details
Pattern can be applied to any distributed system requiring fault tolerance
Implementation includes configurable timeout and retry mechanisms

name: HeterogeneousDataPipelinePattern
observations: Abstracted from Token Processing Pipeline in src/commander/services/sequential_command_processor.py
Core concept: Processing pipeline for heterogeneous data units with fault isolation
Key properties: tokenNormalization, typeBasedProcessing, isolatedExecution, circuitBreakerIntegration
Universal application: Any system processing streams of different data types requiring fault tolerance
Pattern integrity maintained through token type awareness and isolated error handling
Abstract concept: Process diverse data types through a unified pipeline with isolated error handling
Universal application: Any system that needs to process mixed data types while maintaining fault isolation
Key principle: Data type awareness enables specialized processing while pipeline structure ensures consistency
Implementation flexibility: Can be adapted for streaming, batch, or hybrid processing models

name: MultiLevelErrorHandlingPattern
observations: Abstracted from Error Handling Delegation in sequential command processing
Core concept: Hierarchical error handling with both per-unit and system-wide management
Key properties: isolatedTokenErrorHandling, circuitBreakerIntegration, severityBasedLogging, batchContinuation
Universal application: Any batch processing system requiring robust error management
Pattern integrity maintained through token-specific error handling without batch termination
Abstract concept: Manage errors at multiple scopes - individual units and system-wide operations
Universal application: Any complex system requiring granular error management without total failure
Key principle: Isolate failures to prevent cascade while maintaining operational visibility
Implementation flexibility: Can be adapted for different error severity levels and recovery strategies

name: CircuitBreakerPattern
observations: Stateful mechanism to prevent cascading failures in service calls
Core concept: Prevents system overload by temporarily breaking circuit after repeated failures
Key properties: failureThreshold, recoveryTimeout, stateTransitions (CLOSED->OPEN->HALF_OPEN->CLOSED)
Thread-safe implementation using synchronization primitives
Universal application: Any system making external service calls requiring fault isolation
Pattern integrity maintained through state management and configurable parameters
Reduces system downtime by preventing cascading failures
Improves system resilience through controlled degradation
Abstracted from CircuitBreaker implementation in src/commander/utils/circuit_breaker.py

name: VNC Viewer Integration Unit Tests
observations: Unit tests for LogFilenameParser, ClipboardMonitor, SessionRecorder, and SessionPlayer components were successfully created and executed.
Test files are located in `tests/commander/` and follow the `test_<component>.py` naming convention.
Tests cover functionality, robustness, and edge cases as defined in VNC blueprints and roadmap.
Resolved 'AttributeError: 'StatusService' object has no attribute 'status_updated'' by correcting UI initialization order.
Restored 'telnet tab is not visible anymore' by re-integrating the TelnetTab UI component.
Fixed 'selecting load nodes should open explorer to select nodes.json' by re-implementing the file dialog.
Fixed 'select root button should let user load root folder with log files' by re-implementing the folder selection dialog.
Resolved 'AttributeError: 'CommanderPresenter' object has no attribute 'on_node_selected'' by removing the call to the nonexistent method.
Resolved 'AttributeError: 'CommanderPresenter' object has no attribute 'open_log_file'' by moving the functionality to NodeTreePresenter.
Resolved 'buttons in commander log creator lost colour' by adding a custom stylesheet to `src/commander/ui/commander_window.py`.

Resolved re-occurring 'AttributeError: 'function' object has no attribute 'emit'' in `telnet_service.py` by moving signal definitions to class level, removing unnecessary signal existence checks, and cleaning up the code for better maintainability.

Resolved 'TypeError: TelnetService cannot be converted to PyQt6.QtCore.QObject' by making `TelnetService` inherit from `QObject`, defining signals as class-level `pyqtSignal` attributes, adding `super().__init__()` in the constructor, and removing signal initialization in `__init__`.

Resolved 'TypeError: setEnabled(self, a0: bool): argument 1 has unexpected type 'ConnectionState'' by updating `TelnetTab.update_connection_status` to convert `ConnectionState` enum to a boolean value for UI state management.
Resolved 'ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'src'' in `telnet_tab.py` by changing absolute import to relative import (`from ..widgets import ConnectionState`).

description: HeterogeneousDataPipelinePattern integrates StatefulFaultTolerancePattern to prevent cascading failures during token processing
MultiLevelErrorHandlingPattern utilizes StatefulFaultTolerancePattern for system-wide failure protection
HeterogeneousDataPipelinePattern implements MultiLevelErrorHandlingPattern for token-specific error management
